query:
-- Add driverCode to driver_profiles if not exists
ALTER TABLE driver_profiles ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS driver_code VARCHAR(8) UNIQUE;

-- Add companyCode to company_profiles if not exists  
ALTER TABLE company_profiles ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS company_code VARCHAR(8) UNIQUE;

-- Create driver_company_links table if not exists
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS driver_company_links (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  driver_profile_id INT NOT NULL,
  company_id INT NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('pending', 'active', 'declined', 'removed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  invited_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  responded_at TIMESTAMP NULL,
  UNIQUE KEY unique_driver_company (driver_profile_id, company_id),
  INDEX idx_company_id (company_id),
  INDEX idx_driver_profile_id (driver_profile_id)
);
